perspectives.description: John is the college student facing the dilemma of whether to submit a plagiarized assignment or his own incomplete work. His immediate academic success and integrity are at stake.

The professor is responsible for grading John’s assignment and upholding academic integrity within the course. The professor's decisions impact the fairness of the grading process and the learning environment.

Future classmates are students who will take the same course after John and may be affected by the precedent set by John's actions regarding academic integrity. Their learning environment and perceptions of fairness could be influenced.
